summary: Frontend testing completed for Mini-GPT static pre-trained stats and Markov toggle features. All 9 features verified working correctly. Mini-GPT loads 8 layers instantly, shows static pre-trained stats (50 Epochs, 45.2% Accuracy, 1.82 Loss), Markov toggle works correctly with appropriate UI messages, and text generation produces readable Shakespeare text with Markov ON and random characters with Markov OFF (Neural Demo mode).
passed_tests: Test 1: Mini-GPT loads 8 layers onto canvas instantly - PASSED (console shows 'Building model with input shape: [64]', UI shows '8 Layers')
Test 2: Training Panel shows static pre-trained stats - PASSED (50 Epochs, 45.2% Accuracy, 1.82 Loss displayed)
Test 3: Markov Chain toggle visible with recommendation text - PASSED ('Use Markov Chain' with 'Recommended for better results')
Test 4: Markov OFF shows Neural Network Demo Mode warning - PASSED (amber warning box with explanation about random weights)
Test 5: Markov ON shows 'Markov Chain Active' success message - PASSED (green box with explanation)
Test 6: Generate button shows '(Neural - Demo)' when Markov OFF - PASSED (verified via console)
Test 7: Generate button shows '(Markov)' when Markov ON - PASSED (verified via console)
Test 8: Markov ON generates readable Shakespeare-style text - PASSED (generated: 'It is my lady, O, be will the speak again...')
Test 9: Markov OFF generates random characters (demo mode) - PASSED (generated: 'g HOyJqC 'wg OGM'wz:eOasadmU...')
critical_code_review_comments: MINI_GPT_SPECS correctly defines static pre-trained stats: epochs: 50, finalLoss: 1.82, finalAccuracy: '45.2%'
useMarkovFallback state defaults to false (Neural Demo mode by default)
Markov chain generation uses initShakespeareMarkov and generateShakespeareText functions
Neural Demo mode uses trained model with random weights (produces random characters as expected)
WebGL unavailable in headless browser but Markov fallback works correctly

mocked_apis_list: Neural network uses random weights (no actual training) - produces random characters. This is intentional for demo purposes.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Mini-GPT features verified working. Static pre-trained stats display correctly (50 Epochs, 45.2% Accuracy, 1.82 Loss). Markov toggle works - OFF shows Neural Demo warning, ON shows Markov Active success. Text generation: Markov produces readable Shakespeare text, Neural Demo produces random characters (expected behavior). WebGL unavailable in headless browser but doesn't affect functionality since Markov fallback is the recommended mode.
